1155.one_line_summary: Multi-token standard supporting fungible, non-fungible, and semi-fungible tokens in a single contract.
1155.notes: Supports both batch transfers and hybrid fungible/non-fungible token implementations in one contract.

1167.one_line_summary: Minimal proxy contract bytecode for cheap, immutable contract cloning.
1167.notes: Uses delegatecall for low-gas proxy deployment; bytecode-level specification enables direct bytecode interrogation.

1175.one_line_summary: Wallet and shop standard for ERC-20 tokens enabling single-call payments.
1175.notes: Proposes infrastructure for commerce using ERC-20 tokens; status is Stagnant.

1178.one_line_summary: Multi-class fungible token standard supporting multiple token classes within one contract.
1178.notes: Allows tokens to be fungible within same class but non-fungible across classes; status is Stagnant.

1185.one_line_summary: Storage of DNS records within ENS resolver profile for domain name resolution.
1185.notes: Extends ENS with DNS record storage; operates at record-set level rather than zone level.

1191.one_line_summary: Chain-aware checksum encoding for Ethereum addresses to prevent cross-network fund loss.
1191.notes: Extends EIP-55 with chain ID to distinguish addresses across different networks.

1202.one_line_summary: Voting interface standard for on-chain governance with vote casting and result tracking.
1202.notes: Defines voting API with support for single/multi-vote, weights, and delegation; leaves proposals out of scope.

1203.one_line_summary: Multi-class token standard extending ERC-20 with support for multiple fungible token classes.
1203.notes: Hybrid of ERC-20 and ERC-721 with optional class conversion; maintains ERC-20 backwards compatibility.

1207.one_line_summary: DAuth access delegation standard for authorizing contracts to access user data and assets.
1207.notes: Distributed authorization without access tokens; inspired by OAuth but decentralized on-chain.

1261.one_line_summary: Membership Verification Token standard for non-transferable, revocable membership proof.
1261.notes: Non-transferable tokens with attributes; enables permissioned governance and compliance applications.

1271.one_line_summary: Standard signature validation method for smart contracts to verify signed messages.
1271.notes: Enables contract-based signature verification via isValidSignature() function; context-dependent validation.

1319.one_line_summary: Smart contract package registry interface for publishing and retrieving versioned contract packages.
1319.notes: Read/write API for package registries with semver versioning support; companion to EIP-1123.

1328.one_line_summary: WalletConnect URI format specification for QR code-based wallet connection initiation.
1328.notes: Defines URI syntax for v1.0 and v2.0 protocols; enables app-to-wallet communication via QR/link.

1337.one_line_summary: Subscription payment standard enabling recurring blockchain-based subscription transactions.
1337.notes: Uses signed hashes for replay-able transactions; enables SaaS business models on-chain; status is Stagnant.

1363.one_line_summary: Payable token standard enabling callbacks after transfer or approval in single transaction.
1363.notes: Inspired by ERC-721 receiver pattern; maintains ERC-20 backwards compatibility with added callback support.
